title: MCS Wardens and Parrots
description: This modification improves Wardens and Parrots, you can control every features using in-game gamerules!
body:
RESOURCEPACK IS REQUIRED!
===
Main Information
===
* Creator and Developer: [​MC Silver]
* Minecraft Versions: 1.21.9+
* WIKI Version: 26.1v2
* For datapack developers: My datapack ignores all mobs that use data! (1.21.5+) \
  For custom mobs, use data; for non-custom mobs, use tags/scores!
* WARNING! (for PaperMC and PurpurMC Hosters): \
This datapack will only work correctly if you only change the below settings. \
Head over to your server, and go to "config/paper-world-defaults.yml" or "purpur.yml" file. \
Find this "allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards" and set that to true

Commands
=== 
All commands available to the player starts with /function .
---
Menu
---
- /function .menu:mcs_wardens

Uninstall
---
- /function .uninstall:mcs_wardens

Mobs
===
Warden
---
* Warden now fires a projectile Sonic Boom that can be dodged and damages multiple entities
* Sonic Boom's speed is 1 block per tick which travels 32 blocks/meters
* Sonic Booms get weaker, when they travel throught wool block -3 damage per block
* Endermans avoid Wardens and Sonic Boom
* Warden is immune to fall damage
* Warden melee damage reduced from 30 to 21
* Warden has chance to escape, depending on health:
  1. On full health: 1:(1/(500+1)) = ~501 seconds (on average)
  2. On the lowest health: 1:(1/(1+1)) = 2 seconds (on average)
* Warden’s Sonic Boom activates Sculk Shriekers
* Warden can generate a temporary sculk catalyst:
  1. 5% chance while idle
  2. 50% chance while angry
  3. Only if the block is sculk-replaceable
  4. Catalyst reverts to normal sculk if no Warden is within 32 blocks
  5. Temporary sculk catalysts deal 2 damage to nearby mobs
* Every mob can trigger Warden spawning in the Deep Dark, unless a Warden is already within 32     blocks:
  1. 0.16% chance per second for players
  2. 0.83% chance per second for mobs
* Warden gets stunned for 3–5 seconds if it becomes angry at a Parrot with 10% chance per second
* Sonic Boom now emit Sculk soul particles
* Sonic Boom destoys Amethyst Clusters and converts it into Echo Shard (Deep Dark only)

Parrot
---
* Parrots avoid the Warden and its attacks
* Parrot speed increased from 0.4 to 0.8 [+100%]
* Parrot health increased from 6 to 10 [+~66%]
* Parrots can now be bred with seeds
* Parrots regenerate health while sitting on your shoulder
* Baby parrots are born untamed, and when they grow up, they get automatically tamed
* Warden gets stunned for 3–5 seconds if it becomes angry at a Parrot with 10% chance per second
* Parrots on your shoulder now detect hostile entities:
  1. Scan 1 random entity within 32 blocks
  2. If the entity attacked you (or is aggressive), it gets Glowing for 3 seconds
  3. More nearby entities = lower detection chance

Items
===
Echo Bottle
---
* Crafted from 3 Echo Shards
* Stores 352 experience points (≈16 levels from 0)
* Has 90% efficiency (10% XP is lost)
* Hold right click in order to fill bottle
* When full, it's ready to drink

Shrieking Wand
---
* Crafted from 3 Blaze Rods, 1 Ender Eye, 2 Echo Shards, and 1 Ancient City Trim
* Durability: 250
* Costs 10 durability per use
* Cooldown: 3 seconds
* Can be repaired by holding:
  1. Wand in main hand
  2. Sculk block in offhand
* Each Parrot:
  1. Increases Boom damage by +2
  2. Reduces Wand durability cost by 1
* Deals magic damage
* Has critical particles
* Boom visuals:
  1. 12 damage → blue particles
  2. 14 damage → purple particles
* Boom weakens through blocks:
  1. Water: ×2 reduction
  2. Lava: ×4 reduction
  3. Blocks: ×10 reduction
  4. Wool: completely absorbs

Amulet of Echo
---
* Crafted from 4 Phantom Membranes + 1 Echo Shard
* Grants +64 absorption to parrots
* When on parrot:
  1. Emits aura flashes: Chance = (Absorption / 64) × 100% per second
  2. Gives player +4 absorption in 4-block radius on flash
  3. On shoulder: heals +4 health and emits glow particles
* You can interact with it using:
  1. Shears [Removes the amulet]
  2. Phantom Membrane [Fixes the amulet]

Recovery Compass
---
* Displays last death coordinates and distance
* Allows teleportation to death location
* Requirements:
  1. Echo Energy (1 per Echo Shard in offhand)
  2. 1 Ender Eye in inventory
  3. Energy cost: 1 + (distance / 1000)
* Usage:
  1. Hold right-click for 3 seconds
  2. Cooldown: 60 seconds
  3. Works only in the Overworld
